Dialog.name: PFM_BattleResult_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 3}'s power has grown. Now, up to eight Personas can be held in possession at once.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_BattleResult_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 3}'s power has grown. Now, up to ten Personas can be held in possession at once.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_BattleResult_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 3}'s power has grown. Now, up to twelve Personas can be held in possession at once.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_BattleResult_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel more power than I had before...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_BattleResult_Persona
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}With the acquisition of the {f 0 1 41}Vibrant Feather{f 0 1 27}, you can now fuse {f 0 1 35}Mothman{f 0 1 27}, the winged monstrosity of myth![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_BattleResult_Persona
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}With the acquisition of the {f 0 1 41}Pentagram Stone{f 0 1 27}, you can now fuse {f 0 1 35}Decarabia{f 0 1 27}, the pentacle demon![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_BattleResult_Persona
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}With the acquisition of the {f 0 1 41}Lily Petal{f 0 1 27}, you can now fuse {f 0 1 35}Lilith{f 0 1 27}, the queen of the night![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_BattleResult_Persona
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}With the acquisition of the {f 0 1 41}Phoenix Tail{f 0 1 27}, you can now fuse {f 0 1 35}Houou{f 0 1 27}, the bird of fortune![n]{f 1 1}
